subcodes.first_line: O steadfast in the Covenant! The dream thou didst behold is thus interpreted: That mighty tree is the Blessed Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان خوابی که دیده بودی تعبیرش اینست آن درخت تنومند سدره مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @predictions and prophecies
